description_long: This is a medium-sized loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and a slightly domed top. The surface features three distinct diagonal slashes, which are typical of artisan or rustic bread, allowing the dough to expand during baking. The crust appears matte and slightly rough, with subtle color gradients ranging from light tan to deeper brown, suggesting a well-baked exterior. The loaf is oval in shape, with rounded ends and a gently curved profile. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or branding on the surface. The bread looks dense yet soft inside, with a firm but not overly hard crust.
description: A golden-brown, oval loaf of bread with three diagonal slashes and a matte, slightly rough crust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the loaf and all three diagonal slashes on the crust.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded end and the depth of the crust's scoring.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the loaf's length and the slashes from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other rounded end and the curvature of the loaf.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features three diagonal slashes across the top, creating a rustic, artisan appearance. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with no visible seeds or flour dusting.
